basics.name: Adam Bell
basics.label: Computer Science Graduate
basics.summary: Computer Science graduate with a dual background in Psychology and Information Technology. Experienced in full-stack web development, database management, and cybersecurity. Brings strong analytical thinking, communication, and team-collaboration skills to every project.

work.summary: IT-focused HR assistant supporting server infrastructure and HR platform administration.
highlights: Assisted with server and database backups, conversions, and ongoing maintenance to ensure data integrity.
Co-developed a Python screening script to identify and flag potentially harmful contracted individuals.
Updated server UI for improved data entry workflows.
Administered employee permissions and access within the NEOED HR platform.

volunteer.summary: Assisted patients and staff in the ICU with a wide range of tasks in a fast-paced medical environment.
Supported the lead teacher by preparing supplies, guiding students through projects, and maintaining a positive classroom environment.

awards.title: Dean's List
awards.summary: Awarded to students who maintain a 3.5+ GPA.

projects.name: NeuroNICU
projects.summary: Cognitive Neuroscience Toolkit for brain imaging analysis of NICU patients. Implemented precisely timed audio cues correlated against EEG data to assess cognitive function in patients with impaired capabilities.

projects.name: Kālā Forecast
projects.summary: Full-stack financial sustainability web app built for Spire Financial Firm. Features dynamic forecasting, projection analysis, and role-based account management.

projects.name: Project Portal Hawaii
projects.summary: Collaborative web platform for University of Hawaiʻi students to discover and join projects listed by sponsors and faculty.

projects.name: Formula Fish
projects.summary: Text-based Java game presented at the SURF research fair (2024).
